retatrutide.label: Compounded Retatrutide (GLP-1/GIP/glucagon triple agonist)
retatrutide.fallbackEscalation: Adaptive titration with physician sign-off before week 5
retatrutide.fallbackHold: ALT/AST >2x baseline, severe nausea/vomiting, eGFR decline

titrationWeeks.support: Ondansetron 4mg PRN, ginger extract nightly, hydration target 2.4L/day.
Continue anti-nausea protocol; add protein preload before dose window.
Review satiety score and bowel motility before incremental escalation.
Maintain split cadence; physician check-in before week-five titration.
